name: Sesame Lemon Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 Chicken breast, whole, skinned and boned
1/2 inch Ginger, fresh, peeled and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/3 cup Lemon juice, 1/4 cup Sherry, dry with 1/4 cup Honey, 1/4 cup Chicken stock, 2 tablespoons Soy sauce, light, and 2 tablespoons Soy sauce, dark in a bowl. Stir in 1 1/2 teaspoons Salt and black Pepper.
2. Soak dried mushrooms (7) in hot water for 30 minutes, then drain well and shred.
3. In a food processor, mince garlic and ginger. Add remaining marinade ingredients and process until smooth. Pour over chicken, turning to coat. Cover and marinate at room temperature for 30 minutes or up to 4 hours in the refrigerator, stirring occasionally.
4. Heat peanut oil (2 tablespoons) and sesame oil (2 tablespoons) in a wok or large skillet over high heat. Add chicken pieces and stir-fry until opaque and cooked through, but not overcooked. Remove pieces to a bowl and repeat with remaining oil and chicken.
5. Return all chicken to the wok. Add shredded mushrooms, toasted sesame seeds, and sauce mixture. Stir-fry until heated through. Mix in half of the lemon slices.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper. Arrange on a warmed serving platter. Garnish with remaining lemon slices and serve with fluffy white rice.
Bon Appetit LIGHT AND EASY SPECIAL P52
